title: The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) Act, 1948
full_text: The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) Act, 1948 राजनयिक और कौंसलीय आफिसर (शपथ और फीस) अधिनियम,1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194841 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 1948-09-03 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) Act, 1948 Hindi Title: राजनयिक और कौंसलीय आफिसर (शपथ और फीस) अधिनियम,1948 Long Title: An Act to provide for the administration of oaths by diplomatic and consular officers and to prescribe the fees leviable in respect of certain of their official duties. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 03-09-1948 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Diplomatic and Consular Officers (Oaths and Fees) Act, 1948 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Powers as to oaths and notarial acts abroad. Section 4. Punishment for offences under this Act. Section 5. Trial of offences. Section 6. Power to prescribe fees. Section 7. Publication and issue of tables of fees. Section 8. Power to make rules.
